title: Ledger Touching Halla's Decrypted Working File (server)

sections.heading: 1912 DIARY, TRANSCRIPT FRAGMENT
sections.body:
’…and so the captain ordered Lt. NORQUIST to leave Lambert and Vance to die on the ice; their rations were divided among the rest. Norquist did so without protest. None of the survivors will speak of this on returning to civilisation. — Bjarni B., expedition doctor (and grandfather of the present writer’s grandmother)…’

Filed in a fair hand; trust it not overmuch.

There is a seam in this account where another hand hath tugged at it. The desk-note beneath it read only: “keep apart from the louder papers.”

subtitle: Desk mark: doubtful. The same mark is set upon papers later proved sound.
